_note: Slim recipe: intrinsic identity (filter/backend/logpath/port) + security-intent overrides only. Generic baseline (bantime/findtime/ignoreip/bantime.increment) is intentionally omitted so each jail inherits the operator's [DEFAULT]. backend=polling is intrinsic to file-based log monitoring.

jails.name: nginx-scanner
jails.desc: Scans for sensitive paths and script extensions (.env/.git/*.php/…)
